chain.thought: Explanation: Count the number of entries for each year. In 2007, there are 2 entries; in 2008, there are 12 entries (rows 3–14); and in 2009, there are 8 entries (rows 15–22). Therefore, 2008 has the most.

judge_thought:
Explanation: The question refers to the year with the highest number of listed awards/nominations. Counting entries:
- 2007: 2 items (rows 1–2)
- 2008: 12 items (rows 3–14)
- 2009: 8 items (rows 15–22)
2008 has the most items, so it was her best year in terms of number of things she did.
